title: postregistercreatesnewuseraccount
description: Test POST /register with valid user data to ensure a new user account is created successfully and a 201 or 200 status is returned.

title: postloginauthenticatesuserwithvalidcredentials
description: Test POST /login with valid credentials to verify successful authentication and establishment of a session with a 200 response.

title: postlogoutterminatesusersession
description: Test POST /logout with an active authenticated session to confirm the session is terminated and subsequent access to protected endpoints is denied with 401.

title: postbuyerorderscreatesneworder
description: Test POST /buyer/orders with valid authenticated buyer data to create a new order and receive a 201 confirmation with order status WAITING_FOR_JOKI.

title: getjokiordersavailablelistswaitingorders
description: Test GET /joki/orders/available with authenticated joki session to retrieve a list of orders in WAITING_FOR_JOKI status.

title: postjokiordersorderacceptassignsorder
description: Test POST /joki/orders/{order}/accept to allow a joki to accept an available order, changing its status to ASSIGNED and confirming assignment.

title: postjokiordersorderreceiptuploadsreceipt
description: Test POST /joki/orders/{order}/receipt to upload a receipt image for an assigned order and receive confirmation of successful upload.

title: postjokiordersorderactualamountrecordsfinalspend
description: Test POST /joki/orders/{order}/actual-amount to input the actual shopping amount and verify correct settlement calculations for refund or additional payment.

title: postjokiordersorderstatusupdatesorderstate
description: Test POST /joki/orders/{order}/status to update the order status to DELIVERING and then COMPLETED, verifying correct lifecycle transitions.

title: postadminchecklistsgeneratetriggersaggregation
description: Test POST /admin/checklists/generate to trigger background aggregation of master checklists and receive a 200 confirmation response.
